orbit.pass_geometry.effective_thickness.citation: Vallado, D. A. Fundamentals of Astrodynamics and Applications, 4th ed., Microcosm Press, 2013.
orbit.pass_geometry.effective_thickness.validity_domain: LEO passes (300-1200 km), elevation 5-90 deg, dt >= 1 s.
orbit.pass_geometry.effective_thickness.uncertainty_model: Parametric sensitivity over extinction and turbulence settings.
known_failure_regimes: Non-LEO mission classes without dedicated orbit propagator validation.
Extreme weather not captured by effective-thickness atmosphere model.

channel.free_space.attenuation.citation: Bourgoin et al., Optics Express 21(1):1040-1062 (2013), doi:10.1364/OE.21.001040.
channel.free_space.attenuation.validity_domain: Clear-sky free-space QKD links with fixed-parameter atmosphere model.
channel.free_space.attenuation.uncertainty_model: Scintillation and background-rate perturbation with bounded inputs.
known_failure_regimes: Adaptive optics feedback loops not represented in static attenuation model.

detector.click_model.stochastic.validity_domain: Single-photon detector click/noise simulation with calibrated PDE/DCR/jitter.
detector.click_model.stochastic.uncertainty_model: Monte Carlo shot-noise and afterpulse perturbation with explicit seed lineage.
known_failure_regimes: Detector saturation and latching outside calibrated count-rate envelope.
Cryogenic drift without updated calibration inputs.

qkd.bb84_decoy_asymptotic.citation: Lo, Ma, Chen, Phys. Rev. Lett. 94, 230504 (2005), doi:10.1103/PhysRevLett.94.230504.
qkd.bb84_decoy_asymptotic.validity_domain: Asymptotic decoy-state BB84 analysis with trusted source assumptions.
qkd.bb84_decoy_asymptotic.uncertainty_model: Propagation through channel and detector uncertainty bundles.
known_failure_regimes: Finite-key regimes when asymptotic approximation dominates security margin.
Source side-channel leakage beyond modeled misalignment term.

annual_estimate.notes: Annual estimate assumes independent pass yield and clear-sky fraction.
